title: Shapes & Colors (image demo)
description: A small test that references images. Upload fig-shape.png, opt-red.png, and opt-blue.png on the test card.

questions.prompt: What shape is shown in the image?
questions.explanation: The figure is a square — four equal sides and right angles.

questions.prompt: Which swatch is the color red?
questions.explanation: Option A is the red swatch.

questions.prompt: This test references images that you must upload separately.
questions.explanation: Images are uploaded per-test via the Upload images button and matched by filename.
